mapper.sql: id, p0_table_name, p0_row_id, p0_material_code, p0_material_name, target_type, target_id, target_code, target_name, match_type, confidence, notes, created_at, updated_at

id, p0_table_name as p0TableName, p0_row_id as p0RowId, p0_material_code as p0MaterialCode, p0_material_name as p0MaterialName, target_type as targetType, target_id as targetId, target_code as targetCode, target_name as targetName, match_type as matchType, confidence, notes, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt
mapper.select: SELECT FROM code_mapping ORDER BY p0_table_name, p0_row_id
SELECT FROM code_mapping ORDER BY p0_table_name, p0_row_id LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO code_mapping ( p0_table_name, p0_row_id, p0_material_code, p0_material_name, target_type, target_id, target_code, target_name, match_type, confidence, notes, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{p0TableName}, #{p0RowId}, #{p0MaterialCode}, #{p0MaterialName}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{targetCode}, #{targetName}, COALESCE(#{matchType}, 'auto'), #{confidence}, #{notes}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE code_mapping SET p0_table_name = #{p0TableName}, p0_row_id = #{p0RowId}, p0_material_code = #{p0MaterialCode}, p0_material_name = #{p0MaterialName}, target_type = #{targetType}, target_id = #{targetId}, target_code = #{targetCode}, target_name = #{targetName}, match_type = #{matchType}, confidence = #{confidence}, notes = #{notes}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM code_mapping WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM code_mapping WHERE match_type = #{matchType} ORDER BY p0_table_name, p0_row_id
SELECT DISTINCT p0_table_name FROM code_mapping WHERE p0_table_name IS NOT NULL AND p0_table_name != '' ORDER BY p0_table_name
